seo.title: How much is your SaaS worth? | Valuation Calculator | Facto
seo.ogTitle: How much is your SaaS worth? Free valuation calculator
seo.description: Calculate the market value of your SaaS with real multiples used by investors and buyers. Free, instant, no registration.

header.title: How much is
header.subtitle: Enter your current metrics. You will get a realistic market estimate based on multiples used by investors and buyers in 2025–2026.

inputs.revenueType: How do you measure your revenue?

revenue.mrrHint: Subscriptions and contracts only — no one-time fees

growth.label: How much do you grow each month?
growth.hint: Average of the last 3 months. If you haven't grown, put 0

churn.label: How many customers do you lose per month?
churn.hint: Out of every 100 customers, how many leave? E.g.: if you lose 5 → put 5

margin.label: What percentage of what you charge do you keep?
margin.keep: How much of what you charge do you keep?
margin.hint: After paying for servers, APIs, and support. Don't count your salary

insights.ctaTitle: Want to show off these metrics?
insights.ctaDescription: Facto will help you certify your SaaS income so that investors and buyers see exactly what you have.

ranking.title: Your Position
ranking.hint: In relation to other calculated SaaS
ranking.description: Receive your position in the ranking of all those who have calculated their SaaS + 3 tips to improve your valuation based on your metrics.
ranking.reportHint: We have sent you your full market chart and 3 actionable tips to improve your position to
